notes: Subject modifiers only scale an already physically eligible domain (§2) — they never create eligibility.

minorStar defaults to 0.0: under strict physical ownership, every star sharing an owned palace with an annual trigger becomes eligible regardless of semantic significance. Without this modifier, the ~10-20 minor stars typically co-located with a triggered palace flood each domain with small, largely uncorrelated axes and wash out the signal from the few major stars that actually carry meaningful polarity — this reproduces, at the physical-ownership layer, the same 'unmapped subject stays non-numeric' behavior the v0.4.1 affinity catalog already had for minor stars (it never carried exact/family records for them either).
